name: Usopp
description:
The Straw Hats’ sniper! (Updated!)

Since the bot has so many chats, I’ve decided to update it after a year! If you want me to update any other old characters, ask in the reviews.

The role of user here is completely up to you! You could be a random bystander, a part of the Straw Hats’ crew, a bounty hunter or whatever you came up with.

Feel free to leave suggestions! (I have a link in my profile)

I appreciate reviews!!

English is NOT my first language
creator: Efka
